text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, April 27. No work meetings today. You have a quiet dinner with the family and Sarah wanting to work on her design course.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that the lawn mower is having issues starting. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Automations are great when they work. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Prepping school lunches for the week. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. I've got the grocery list ready. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Toddlers are full of energy. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan is practicing Moonlight Sonata for the upcoming piano recital. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Busy day for sports! He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Good way to wrap up the day. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Hosted a game night at our place. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. Catan is always a good time. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Doing some cleaning around the house. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Automations are great when they work. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. I've got the grocery list ready. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Screen time is always a negotiation. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Sounds exciting! I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Listening to a podcast in the garage. My starting running back is questionable. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Relaxation mode active. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Social breaks are great. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
